scripts.build:packages: bun run build:wasm && bun --filter @reversi/core build && bun --filter @reversi/board-ui build && bun --filter @reversi/bot build && bun --filter @reversi/bot-minimax build && bun --filter @reversi/bot-alphazero build
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:browser
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run test:browser && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: bun run build && bunx playwright test
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run test:unit
